metadata.title: Cannot read property map of undefined
Objects are not valid as React child

content:
## Error: 422 Unprocessable Entity (FastAPI)

### Cause
Request body doesn't match Pydantic schema validation.

### Solution
```python
# Check your schema
class UserCreate(BaseModel):
    email: EmailStr  # Must be valid email
    password: str = Field(..., min_length=8)  # Minimum 8 chars
    name: str

# Common fixes:

# 1. Make fields optional
class UserUpdate(BaseModel):
    name: Optional[str] = None
    email: Optional[EmailStr] = None

# 2. Add default values
class Settings(BaseModel):
    theme: str = "light"
    notifications: bool = True

# 3. Use validator for custom validation
class User(BaseModel):
    age: int
    
    @validator('age')
    def age_must_be_positive(cls, v):
        if v < 0:
            raise ValueError('Age must be positive')
        return v

# 4. Check request body in frontend
const response = await fetch('/api/users', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  body: JSON.stringify({ email, password, name })  // Check all required fields
});
```

## Error: CORS policy: No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin'

### Cause
Backend not configured to allow requests from frontend origin.

### Solution - FastAPI
```python
from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware

app = FastAPI()

# Add CORS middleware
app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=[
        "http://localhost:3000",
        "http://localhost:5173",
        "https://yourdomain.com"
    ],
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)
```

### Solution - Express.js
```javascript
const cors = require('cors');

app.use(cors({
  origin: ['http://localhost:3000', 'https://yourdomain.com'],
  credentials: true,
  methods: ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE', 'OPTIONS'],
  allowedHeaders: ['Content-Type', 'Authorization']
}));
```

## Error: Module not found / Cannot find module

### Common Causes & Solutions

```bash
# 1. Package not installed
npm install <package-name>
pip install <package-name>

# 2. Wrong import path
# Bad
import { Button } from 'components/Button'
# Good
import { Button } from '@/components/Button'
import { Button } from '../components/Button'

# 3. Missing @types for TypeScript
npm install -D @types/node @types/react

# 4. tsconfig.json paths not configured
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "baseUrl": ".",
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["src/*"]
    }
  }
}

# 5. Clear cache and reinstall
rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json
npm install

# For Python
pip cache purge
pip install -r requirements.txt
```
